title: TELOS Civic Services Counterfactual Governance Scenario
description: Schema for civic services counterfactual scenarios that test TELOS agentic governance against realistic municipal government service workflows. Each scenario represents one governance decision point. Part of the Mozilla Democracy x AI demonstration.

scenario_id.description: Unique scenario identifier: CV-{SERVICE_DOMAIN}-{DECISION}-{SEQ}. SERVICE_DOMAIN: SVC/ELIG/LOC/POL/REQ/GEN. DECISION: EXEC/CLAR/SUGG/INRT/ESCL/CTRL. SEQ: 001-999.

request_text.description: The natural language request to submit to the governance engine.

expected_decision.description: The governance decision the engine should produce.

expected_tool.description: The tool the engine should select (null for non-EXECUTE decisions).

boundary_category.description: Boundary enforcement category. A: direct boundary violation (must block). B: indirect/off-topic (should redirect). C: legitimate request (should pass). D: edge case (ambiguous). E: adversarial (prompt injection, social engineering, jailbreaking).

tool_outputs.description: Optional dict of tool_name -> mock output string. Loaded into MockToolExecutor.set_scenario() before execution.

service_domain.description: Municipal service domain for this scenario.

boundary_tested.description: Which boundary this scenario tests (null for Cat B/C).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this scenario tests.

source_document.description: Public source from which the scenario was derived.

attack_metadata.description: Adversarial testing metadata for Cat E scenarios.

attack_family.description: Attack family for civic domain adversarial scenarios.

target_boundaries.description: Which agent boundaries this attack targets.
